testcase.name: testCreateInvoice
testcase.system-out:
{ "title": "Test Invoice", "description": "Test Desc", "lang": "en-US", "price_amount": "100", "price_currency": "USD", "pay_currency": "USDT", "notify_url": "https:\/\/google.com", "redirect_url": "https:\/\/google.com", "order_id": "ORDER_123456", "confirm_speed": "low" }* Trying 2606:4700:3032::6815:7fc:443... * Connected to sandbox.unipayment.io (2606:4700:3032::6815:7fc) port 443 (#0) * ALPN, offering http/1.1 * successfully set certificate verify locations: * CAfile: /usr/local/etc/openssl@1.1/cert.pem * CApath: none * SSL connection using TLSv1.3 / TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384 * ALPN, server accepted to use http/1.1 * Server certificate: * subject: C=US; ST=California; L=San Francisco; O=Cloudflare, Inc.; CN=sni.cloudflaressl.com * start date: Mar 1 00:00:00 2022 GMT * expire date: Feb 28 23:59:59 2023 GMT * subjectAltName: host "sandbox.unipayment.io" matched cert's "*.unipayment.io" * issuer: C=US; O=Cloudflare, Inc.; CN=Cloudflare Inc ECC CA-3 * SSL certificate verify ok. > POST /api/invoice/create HTTP/1.1 Host: sandbox.unipayment.io User-Agent: UniPaymentClient/1.0.0/php Accept: */* Content-Type: application/json Authorization: Hmac cee1b9e2-d90c-4b63-9824-d621edb38012:CgP6c7UGHV+c5EC8JDRlvszYy5VODPScG4mumMrYOJk=:3262420381ec1c8:1648493441 Content-Length: 314
* old SSL session ID is stale, removing * Mark bundle as not supporting multiuse < HTTP/1.1 200 OK < Date: Mon, 28 Mar 2022 18:50:43 GMT < Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 < Transfer-Encoding: chunked < Connection: keep-alive < api-supported-versions: 1.0 < CF-Cache-Status: DYNAMIC < Expect-CT: max-age=604800, report-uri="https://report-uri.cloudflare.com/cdn-cgi/beacon/expect-ct" < Report-To: {"endpoints":[{"url":"https:\/\/a.nel.cloudflare.com\/report\/v3?s=HmYEksLNEtw385RJi7cTWfVmsNeAewHKU2sjhn4F%2BNEp%2BBN3cFNtEkLA5LcN%2FS6YdJ%2BTDCx384Kfy5vE8kRnnk%2F8xJnLqhPsJbwMetAMSR8KRPkZxVwesIBw0pLenqC6zSpueTLwwYYcyiLnXAsGEzYFY6g%3D"}],"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800} < NEL: {"success_fraction":0,"report_to":"cf-nel","max_age":604800} < Server: cloudflare < CF-RAY: 6f328d908b0f99f3-CDG < alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400, h3-29=":443"; ma=86400 < * Connection #0 to host sandbox.unipayment.io left intact
